title: lithocarpus debaryanus
intro: Lithocarpus debaryanus, also known as Debary's tanbark oak, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. The medicinal properties of Lithocarpus debaryanus include its astringent, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive problems, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. Lithocarpus debaryanus can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
